explainer: Research-only control plane for multi-family strategy discovery, evaluation, and approval-gated promotion.

families.label: Betfair Information-Lag Books
families.explainer: Tracks related-market lag and cross-book stale pricing patterns before they are trusted for execution.

families.label: Betfair Prediction/Value League
families.explainer: Compares prediction, calibration, and policy-gated value-betting lineages on the same snapshots.

families.label: Binance Cascade/Regime
families.explainer: Uses liquidation, depth collapse, and regime features for short-horizon cascade alpha.

families.label: Binance Funding Contrarian
families.explainer: Uses funding, basis, open interest, and regime features to rank contrarian directional setups.

families.label: Polymarket Cross-Venue Signals
families.explainer: Runs signal leagues on Polymarket quotes and cross-venue confirmations to rank paper-only opportunities.
